name: Pneumonia - Chest X-ray Procedure Query
description: **Sixth Procedure-resource phenotype.** Tests ability to find pneumonia patients via chest X-ray — the standard imaging used to confirm pneumonia. Tests whether LLM correctly queries Procedure resources for diagnostic imaging (different from biopsy/EEG/colonoscopy/polysomnography/CABG).
prompt: Find patients who have undergone a chest X-ray procedure.

prompts.broad: Find Procedure resources for plain chest X-ray — the standard imaging modality used to confirm pneumonia (looking for infiltrates, consolidation, or effusion).
prompts.expert: I need Procedure resources for chest X-ray. Use SNOMED code 399208008 (Plain X-ray of chest). Query: Procedure?code=http://snomed.info/sct|399208008

metadata.algorithm_path_description: Patients with chest X-ray. **Sixth Procedure-resource phenotype** in suite (after CHD revasc, polysomnography, colonoscopy, prostate biopsy, EEG). First diagnostic imaging procedure type.
